title: weather fluctuation
content:
The weather has taken its tow on me. It started from my classic allergy on Friday. %(me)I usually have a coughing allergy.% Then my nose started running. Finally, I had a small fever.

Right now the fever is gone and my nose is quite exhausted. %(me)i.e., it almost stops running.% And the coughing is almost gone.

But the weather forecast states that the temperature is rising again tomorrow or Wednesday. %(me)Believe it or not, the forecast is rather accurate these days!% ... The process might start all over again. --"
